zh.lifeSummary: 當High King Toirdelbach Mór Ua Conchobair of Ireland於大約1088年出生在愛爾蘭康瑙特時，他的父親Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht37歲，母親Princess Mor O’Briain34歲。他和Caillech Dé Ní Eidin至少有14個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1156年5月19日在愛爾蘭庫迪 高威登莫享年69歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 奧法利可隆馬可諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当High King Toirdelbach Mór Ua Conchobair of Ireland于大约1088年出生在爱尔兰康瑙特时，他的父亲Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht37岁，母亲Princess Mor O’Briain34岁。他和Caillech Dé Ní Eidin至少有14个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1156年5月19日在爱尔兰庫迪 高威登莫享年69岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 奧法利可隆馬可諾。

nameMeanings.name: Ua
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Anil, Prem, Shyam, Anuj, Naresh, Raj, Ramesh, Satish, Usha, Aashish, Anit, Aparna.
Indian (Punjab): Arora and Sikh name, perhaps from Arabic duʿā ‘invocation, good wish’.

nameMeanings.name: Mór
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name from mór ‘large, great’. This was the commonest of all girls’ names in late medieval Ireland, and has continued in use in both Ireland and Scotland to the present day.

en.lifeSummary: When High King Toirdelbach Mór Ua Conchobair of Ireland was born about 1088, in Connaught, Ireland, his father, Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht, was 37 and his mother, Princess Mor O’Briain, was 34. He had at least 14 sons and 2 daughters with Caillech Dé Ní Eidin. He died on 19 May 1156, in Dunmore, County Galway, Ireland, at the age of 69, and was buried in Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque High King Toirdelbach Mór Ua Conchobair of Ireland est né environ 1088, à Connaught, Irlande, son père, Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Princess Mor O’Briain, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 14 fils et 2 filles avec Caillech Dé Ní Eidin. Il est décédé le 19 mai 1156, à Dunmore, County Galway, Irlande, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als High King Toirdelbach Mór Ua Conchobair of Ireland um 1088 in Connaught, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht 37 und seine Mutter Princess Mor O’Briain 34. Er hatte mit Caillech Dé Ní Eidin mindestens 14 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Mai 1156 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Dunmore, County Galway, Irland und wurde in Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando High King Toirdelbach Mór Ua Conchobair of Ireland è nato il circa 1088 nel Connaught, Irlanda, il suo padre, Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Princess Mor O’Briain, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 14 figli e 2 figlie con Caillech Dé Ní Eidin. Morì il 19 maggio 1156, nel Dunmore, County Galway, Irlanda, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: High King Toirdelbach Mór Ua Conchobair of Irelandが約1088年にアイルランドコナウトで生まれた時，父Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connachtは37歳，母Princess Mor O’Briainは34歳であった。彼はCaillech Dé Ní Eidinとの間に少なくとも14人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1156年5月19日にアイルランドコウントイ ガルワイダンモーで69歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ オファリークロンマクノイゼにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: High King Toirdelbach Mór Ua Conchobair of Ireland(이)가 대략 1088년 아일랜드 콘오그h트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Princess Mor O’Briain(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Caillech Dé Ní Eidin(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1156년 5월 19일 아일랜드 카운티 갈웨이 던모어에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 파리 클론마c노이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando High King Toirdelbach Mór Ua Conchobair of Ireland nasceu aproximadamente 1088, em Connaught, Irlanda, seu pai, Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Princess Mor O’Briain, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 14 filhos e 2 filhas com Caillech Dé Ní Eidin. Ele faleceu em 19 de maio de 1156, em Dunmore, County Galway, Irlanda, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда High King Toirdelbach Mór Ua Conchobair of Ireland родился около 1088 г. в местности коннот, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Mor O’Briain, 34. У него было по крайней мере 14 сыновей и 2 дочери от Caillech Dé Ní Eidin. Он умер 19 мая 1156 г. в местности дунмор, коунти галвеи, Ирландия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности клонмакноис, коунти оффали, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando High King Toirdelbach Mór Ua Conchobair of Ireland nació aproximadamente 1088, en Connaught, Irlanda, su papá, Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Princess Mor O’Briain, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 14 hijos y 2 hijas con Caillech Dé Ní Eidin. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1156, en Dunmore, County Galway, Irlanda, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irlanda.
